TT_RUN: Start the trading engine (Live mode required).
TT_RESUME: Resume after Risk Guard halt; clears halt flag.
TT_GUARD: Risk Guard auto-protects capital and pauses when DD exceeds threshold.
TT_CONVERT_USDC_MAN: Manual: you trigger conversion to USDC when desired.
TT_CONVERT_USDC_AUTO: Auto: system converts to USDC at scheduled time (if enabled).
TT_STOPLOSS: Daily stop-loss (%). Trading halts when PnL/day ≤ -X%.
TT_KELLY_K: Adaptive stop based on volatility: threshold = k × volatility (day).
TT_MINPCT: Minimum stop-loss (%) floor used by adaptive mode.
TT_MAXDD: Max drawdown per day (%). Above this trading remains paused until next day.
TT_RPC: Comma/space separated RPC endpoints. Choose the closest (low RTT).
TT_JITO: Jito relays endpoints for bundle submission (2–3 stable relays recommended).
TT_PUBKEY: WALLET_PUBKEY is your public address (base58), not the private key.
TT_HELIUS: Optional API key for faster indexing/data.
TT_JITOAUTH: Optional bundle auth token for Jito submissions.
TT_FLUSH: Clear volatile metrics in Redis (safe). Does not touch keys or secrets.
TT_EXPORT_LOGS: Download all logs as a zip for debugging/audit.
TT_EXPORT_CSV: Download route-level PnL CSV for analysis/tuning.
TT_TG_TOKEN: Bot token from @BotFather (format: 12345:ABC...). Optional but recommended.
TT_TG_CHAT: One or more chat IDs separated by comma. Use @userinfobot to get your ID. Optional.
GPG_MISSING: Missing encrypted key (/opt/solbot/keys/id.json.gpg). Use 'Encrypt key now' on main panel.
TT_LANG: Switch language for UI and tooltips.
TT_WIZ_TITLE: This wizard helps you set mandatory configs and test endpoints.
TT_RPC_CAND: List of RPC endpoints. Best to place a private, low-RTT endpoint first.
TT_JITO_RELAYS: List of Jito relays for bundle submission (2–3 reliable).
TT_PUBKEY_FIELD: Public address of your wallet (base58). Not a private key.
TT_HELIUS_FIELD: Optional API key for faster indexing/data.
TT_JITO_AUTH_FIELD: Optional token for Jito bundle auth.
TT_TG_TOKEN_FIELD: Bot token from @BotFather. Optional but recommended for alerts.
TT_TG_CHAT_FIELD: One or more chat IDs separated by comma. Optional.
TT_BTN_TEST_RPC: Send getHealth to each RPC and measure RTT.
TT_BTN_TEST_JITO: Probe each relay and measure RTT.
TT_BTN_AUTORANK_RPC: Benchmark RPCs and move best to the top of .env.
TT_BTN_AUTORANK_JITO: Benchmark relays and move best to the top of .env.
TT_BTN_TEST_APPLY: Benchmark both RPC & Jito and apply best in one click.
TT_BTN_EXPORT: Download .env and preset files as a zip.
TT_BTN_APPLY_START: Run preflight then start the stack (tmux services).
TT_GPG_STATUS: Shows whether encrypted key file exists.
TT_PANEL_RUN: Start trading engine (requires Live mode & full setup).
TT_PANEL_RESUME: Clear halt and resume trading after Risk Guard stop.
TT_PANEL_CONVERT_USDC: Convert inventory to USDC (manual/auto depending on mode).
TT_PANEL_GUARD: Risk Guard protects capital with daily stop-loss/drawdown caps.
TT_PANEL_ALERTS_BADGE: Alerts status. Configure Telegram to receive notifications.
TT_PANEL_SETUP_BADGE: Overall setup status. Click Details to see missing items.
TT_PANEL_RESTART: Stop and start all services safely.
TT_PANEL_FLUSH: Flush transient analytics metrics in Redis (safe).
TT_NET_HEALTH: View benchmarked p50/p95 and error rate for RPC & Relays.
TT_REFRESH_HEALTH: Reload health stats from latest benchmarks/collectors.
TT_ROTATE_BEST_RPC: Move the lowest p95 RPC to the top of .env without restart.
TT_ROTATE_BEST_RELAY: Move the lowest p95 relay to the top of .env without restart.
TT_EXPORT_DIAG: Download logs + masked .env + tmux status as a zip for support/VC.
TT_ROUTE_FILTER: Filter dashboard stats by a specific route.
TT_RUN_COLLECTOR: Probe all RPC/Relays now and update health tables.
TT_AUTO_BLACKLIST: When enabled, endpoints with high p95/error are moved to the end.
TT_BLACKLIST_P95: Endpoints with p95 above this will be deprioritized/blacklisted.
TT_BLACKLIST_ERR: Endpoints with error-rate above this will be deprioritized/blacklisted.
